rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERTRUDE BEVERLY WELLS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/10/2026. Issue necessitating a continuance: a petition for final distribution (and the proposed order) must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed to each distributee, including the number of shares of securities and the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) to be distributed to each beneficiary (LRSF 14.35.I.6.a). In a verifed supplement to the petition, please indicate the amounts of the proposed distribution to the beneficiaires. Please deliver courtesy copies of all further filings and an updated proposed order to this examiner no later than 01/26/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARION LETITIA GRADY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IHSAN BAKER DUJAILI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. 1) The Inventory Appraisal filed on 10/20/25 is defective for the following reasons: a. Non-cash assets are listed in Attachment 1 i. Tangible personal property ii. It is unclear whether items 4&5 are cash assets (were they lump sum payouts upon death?) b. Assets that do not belong on the I&A were listed i. Arab Bank account ii. Real property in Jordan Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARRIAGE OF LISA MAGRUDER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues must be cleared: (1) Attachment 4, titled "SF City Hall Events," appears to be a signed contract and follow-up communication for the wedding event. This attachment alone does not establish the fact of the marriage. A verified supplemental declaration providing factual support must be filed by the petitioner. (2) The verified supplemental declaration may include details about the marriage license, such as whether it had been issued and/or delivered back to the office, and so on. (3) If applicable, a written affidavit from the officiant of the marriage, attendees, or anyone else who can attest to the validity of the marriage should also be submitted. (4) Proposed Order (VS 122 - Page 1 only) must be submitted. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
